title: SGV-010 Kaori Otonashi - Otonashi Kaori
overview: The second son and his wife are restructured and return to their parents' home. The father and brother warmly welcome the couple, but with a certain soul. In a village where women have disappeared due to depopulation, the daughter-in-law of the second son is a precious existence. He stole the eyes of his unreliable second son and approached his wife, saying, "Because they have the same blood type, I don't know even if I have a child." The vaginal cum shot that was as shameful as possible continued every day until the bride got pregnant ...
